seoDescription: Emergency repairs, preventive maintenance, and technical support for 5-20 kVA diesel generators.

hero.heading: Service Support For 5-20 kVA Diesel Generators
hero.body: GenFix supports construction, utilities, and commercial sites with rapid breakdown response and structured maintenance programs for 5-20 kVA diesel generators.

sections.title: Repair Coverage For 5-20 kVA Diesel Units
sections.body: Our field technicians diagnose and repair diesel generator systems with a focus on safe restoration, root-cause correction, and reduced repeat failures.

cards.title: Emergency Breakdowns
cards.description: Rapid dispatch for no-start faults, unstable voltage, alarms, leaks, control failures, and unexpected shutdowns.

cards.title: On-Site Diagnostics
cards.description: Electrical and mechanical fault tracing including AVR, alternator, fuel system, and engine performance checks.

cards.title: Workshop Repairs
cards.description: Component repairs, controller replacements, and practical refurbishment pathways for fleet reliability.

sections.title: Preventive Maintenance Programs
sections.body: Reduce emergency callouts with GenFix preventive maintenance programs designed around runtime hours, compliance, and site conditions.

cards.title: Routine Scheduled Service
cards.description: Oil, filter, coolant, battery, and belt checks with inspection of alternator and control systems.

cards.title: Load Verification Testing
cards.description: Controlled testing validates performance and identifies hidden faults before peak demand periods.

cards.title: Fuel And Cooling Reliability
cards.description: Tank, line, injector, and cooling-system checks for high-temperature and high-duty cycle operation.

sections.title: Rental Fleet Service Support
sections.body: We keep rented 5-20 kVA diesel units reliable through commissioning checks, on-hire service, and responsive field support.

cards.title: Pre-Delivery Checks
cards.description: Unit verification before dispatch so rentals arrive ready for immediate deployment.

cards.title: On-Hire Servicing
cards.description: Scheduled checks and condition monitoring through the rental period to minimize downtime risk.

cards.title: Rapid Swap Support
cards.description: Fast replacement coordination if a unit cannot be restored quickly on site.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body: Common questions from site managers and operations teams planning repair work or long-term service coverage.

cards.title: How quickly can GenFix attend a breakdown?
cards.description: Response timing depends on location and access, but urgent requests are triaged immediately with nearest available technician allocation.

cards.title: Do you service generators not supplied by GenFix?
cards.description: Yes. We support a broad range of diesel generator brands in the 5-20 kVA class after initial assessment and safety verification.

cards.title: Can maintenance be scheduled outside normal hours?
cards.description: For operational sites, service windows can be planned for shutdown periods, nights, or low-demand shifts where practical.

contactPanel.heading: Need Diesel Generator Support Now?
contactPanel.body: Share your site location, generator details, and fault symptoms. The GenFix service team will recommend a response pathway and coordinate field support.
contactPanel.responseTime: Initial response target: within 30 minutes during service hours
